name: Green Bean Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the green beans and reserve 1/4 cup of the liquid.
2. Alternate layers of beans and onions in a baking dish.
3. Mix the soup, bean liquid, and soy sauce in a separate bowl.
4. Pour the mixture over the vegetables.
5. Sprinkle with 1/2 cup grated cheese.
6. Bake for 20-30 minutes at 350°F (175°C). Double or triple the recipe if needed.
